scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=modules/crypto && npm run build --workspace=modules/json && npm run build --workspace=modules/util && npm run build --workspace=modules/dag && npm run build --workspace=modules/dag_test && npm run build --workspace=modules/dag_sql && npm run build --workspace=modules/dag_sqlite && npm run build --workspace=modules/replica && npm run build --workspace=modules/mesh && npm run build --workspace=modules/mesh_ws
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=modules/crypto && npm run test small --workspace=modules/dag && npm run test --workspace=modules/dag_sql && npm run test --workspace=modules/dag_sqlite && npm run test --workspace=modules/replica && npm run test --workspace=modules/mesh && npm run test --workspace=modules/mesh_ws
